analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet quotes Wang Yi saying China and the US should not try to remodel each other and should work toward peaceful coexistence of different systems and civilizations. Evaluation: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) – Not promoted; there is no denunciation of the West or portrayal of hostility or decadence. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Promoted; it advances a cooperative, peaceful coexistence framing consistent with China's portrayal as supporting mutual respect among different systems, aligning with a benevolent, cooperative international stance. CH3 (China has an epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) – Partially implied by the call to respect different systems, but the tweet does not explicitly advocate China's domestic system or values; focus is on international coexistence, so not counted. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not addressed. CH6 (Culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
